title: schema.org AlignmentObject exporter + golden fixtures
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. Every export is a projection of the canonical AlignmentRecord; this one emits schema.org/LRMI.
objective: Build the schema.org AlignmentObject exporter with committed golden fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Emits schema.org AlignmentObject / LearningResource JSON-LD per AlignmentRecord, referencing the standard by identifier (educationalAlignment target).
Ships committed golden canonical-record -> expected-schema.org pairs, diffed in CI.
Reference-by-identifier respected; statementText emitted only where frameworkTerms.permitsTextReproduction is true.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; the commit is DCO signed-off; no credentials or secrets committed.
